'''âp-v-p''' ('''pavapa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:change|change]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-v-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:change|change]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-v-p
|-
! Lemma
| pavapa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pavapithi|pavapithi]] || [[word:pavapiji|pavapiji]] || [[word:pavapishi|pavapishi]] || [[word:pavapi|pavapi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pavaputhuth|pavaputhuth]] || [[word:pavapujuj|pavapujuj]] || [[word:pavapushush|pavapushush]] || [[word:pavap|pavap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pavaputhu|pavaputhu]] || [[word:pavapuju|pavapuju]] || [[word:pavapushu|pavapushu]] || [[word:pavapu|pavapu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pavapufuth|pavapufuth]] || [[word:pavapufuj|pavapufuj]] || [[word:pavapufush|pavapufush]] || [[word:pavapuf|pavapuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pavapethe|pavapethe]] || [[word:pavapeje|pavapeje]] || [[word:pavapeshe|pavapeshe]] || [[word:pavape|pavape]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pavapothoth|pavapothoth]] || [[word:pavapojoj|pavapojoj]] || [[word:pavaposhosh|pavaposhosh]] || [[word:pavap|pavap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pavapotho|pavapotho]] || [[word:pavapojo|pavapojo]] || [[word:pavaposho|pavaposho]] || [[word:pavapo|pavapo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pavapofoth|pavapofoth]] || [[word:pavapofoj|pavapofoj]] || [[word:pavapofosh|pavapofosh]] || [[word:pavapof|pavapof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pavapĂŠthĂŠ|pavapĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:pavapĂŠjĂŠ|pavapĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:pavapĂŠshĂŠ|pavapĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:pavapĂŠ|pavapĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pavapathath|pavapathath]] || [[word:pavapajaj|pavapajaj]] || [[word:pavapashash|pavapashash]] || [[word:pavap|pavap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pavapatha|pavapatha]] || [[word:pavapaja|pavapaja]] || [[word:pavapasha|pavapasha]] || [[word:pavapa|pavapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pavapafath|pavapafath]] || [[word:pavapafaj|pavapafaj]] || [[word:pavapafash|pavapafash]] || [[word:pavapaf|pavapaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:pavapasha|pavapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gopavapasha|gopavapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokipavapasha|gokipavapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:pavapnĂŒsha|pavapnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gopavapnknĂŒsha|gopavapnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokipavapnĂŒsha|gokipavapnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pavapshĂ«sha|pavapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopavapnkshĂ«sha|gopavapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipavapshĂ«sha|gokipavapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pavaprosha|pavaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopavapnkrosha|gopavapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipavaprosha|gokipavaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pavapmusha|pavapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gopavapnkmusha|gopavapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipavapmusha|gokipavapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:pavapsherasha|pavapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gopavapnksherasha|gopavapnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokipavapsherasha|gokipavapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:pavapngasha|pavapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gopavapnkngasha|gopavapnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokipavapngasha|gokipavapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pavapyasha|pavapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gopavapnkyasha|gopavapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokipavapyasha|gokipavapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:pavapyamasha|pavapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gopavapnkyamasha|gopavapnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokipavapyamasha|gokipavapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:pavapnĂŒshĂ«sha|pavapnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopavapnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gopavapnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipavapnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokipavapnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pavapnĂŒrosha|pavapnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopavapnknĂŒrosha|gopavapnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipavapnĂŒrosha|gokipavapnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pavapnĂŒmusha|pavapnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopavapnknĂŒmusha|gopavapnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipavapnĂŒmusha|gokipavapnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:pavapshĂ«nĂŒsha|pavapshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopavapnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gopavapnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipavapshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokipavapshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pavapshĂ«rosha|pavapshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopavapnkshĂ«rosha|gopavapnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipavapshĂ«rosha|gokipavapshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pavapshĂ«musha|pavapshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopavapnkshĂ«musha|gopavapnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipavapshĂ«musha|gokipavapshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:pavapronĂŒsha|pavapronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopavapnkronĂŒsha|gopavapnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipavapronĂŒsha|gokipavapronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:pavaproshĂ«sha|pavaproshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopavapnkroshĂ«sha|gopavapnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipavaproshĂ«sha|gokipavaproshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pavapromusha|pavapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopavapnkromusha|gopavapnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipavapromusha|gokipavapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:pavapmunĂŒsha|pavapmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopavapnkmunĂŒsha|gopavapnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipavapmunĂŒsha|gokipavapmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:pavapmushĂ«sha|pavapmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopavapnkmushĂ«sha|gopavapnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipavapmushĂ«sha|gokipavapmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pavapmurosha|pavapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopavapnkmurosha|gopavapnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipavapmurosha|gokipavapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:pavap|pavap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:pĂŠvĂŠp|pĂŠvĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hopavap|hopavap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hopĂŠvĂŠp|hopĂŠvĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopavap|hohopavap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopĂŠvĂŠp|hohopĂŠvĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒpavap|nĂŒpavap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒpĂŠvĂŠp|nĂŒpĂŠvĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒpavap|nĂŒnĂŒpavap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒpĂŠvĂŠp|nĂŒnĂŒpĂŠvĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻpavap|nĂŻpavap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻpĂŠvĂŠp|nĂŻpĂŠvĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻpavap|nĂŻnĂŻpavap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻpĂŠvĂŠp|nĂŻnĂŻpĂŠvĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lupavap|lupavap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lupĂŠvĂŠp|lupĂŠvĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupavap|lulupavap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupĂŠvĂŠp|lulupĂŠvĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lipavap|lipavap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lipĂŠvĂŠp|lipĂŠvĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipavap|lilipavap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipĂŠvĂŠp|lilipĂŠvĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kopavap|kopavap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kopĂŠvĂŠp|kopĂŠvĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopavap|kokopavap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopĂŠvĂŠp|kokopĂŠvĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kepavap|kepavap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kepĂŠvĂŠp|kepĂŠvĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepavap|kekepavap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepĂŠvĂŠp|kekepĂŠvĂŠp]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
